markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content pipeline, holiday planning, and project updates.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** Nacho will aggressively approve topics to build a holiday runway. The new strategy is to reject any topic not an immediate "strong fit" to keep the pipeline clear and provide specific feedback for better future research.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [**Holiday Plan:** To maintain velocity during the Dec 24–Jan 5 shutdown, Growth X will increase article production, aiming to deliver content a week ahead for Relay to review.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**2026 Project:** Relay's dev team can support the project's interactive elements, but only if tickets are submitted by the end of this week. This is a critical timeline constraint due to a developer's 3-month Contentful migration project.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Reporting Issues:** Bailey flagged two issues: Relay's Google Search Console access is limited, hindering indexing monitoring, and engagement rates are near 100%, suggesting a tracking error that skews data.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Strategy

  - [A large batch of content was published; metrics are pending.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Nacho will review the internal content process for streamlining.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [**Pipeline Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [Staging: 5 articles](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [Relay Review: 8 articles](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [New this week: 5 articles](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [**Topic Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [Growth X completed keyword research from Relay's docs, generating \~100 potential topics.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [The first batch is in Airtable for review.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [The "Accounting" cluster description was broadened.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [The "Banking Alternatives" cluster is light; new topics will be added by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**New Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [**Action:** Reject any topic not an immediate "strong fit."](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This keeps the pipeline clear and provides specific feedback (e.g., wrong persona) for better future research.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### Holiday Planning

  - [**Relay Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Active: Next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Shutdown: Dec 24–Jan 5 (activity will slow the week of Dec 22)](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Growth X Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Increase production to deliver articles a week ahead.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Goal → Maintain velocity and build a review runway for Relay.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Project Updates

  - [**FAQ Schema:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Relay has not yet implemented the FAQ schema on the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Growth X will proceed with adding FAQ content to articles, as the schema can be implemented later.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**2026 Project Scoping:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [Growth X will deliver a scope document by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Relay's dev team owns interactive elements; Growth X owns editorial and Contentful architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**Relay's Capacity:** Possible, but requires tickets by EOW due to a developer's 3-month Contentful migration project.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [**Action:** Nacho to discuss feasibility with Bethany.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### Reporting & Analytics

  - [**Google Search Console Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Issue:** Growth X's access is limited, hindering indexing monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Action:** Nacho will grant full domain property access.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**Engagement Rate Anomaly:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**Issue:** Engagement rates are near 100% on the homepage, pricing page, and blog.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**Concern:** This suggests a tracking error that skews data and makes analysis unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**Action:** Nacho will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**Recent Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [Steady organic traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [Emerging traffic from Claude (LLM).](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [Growth in content citations.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nacho:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Review and approve content topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [Discuss 2026 project dev support with Bethany.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [Grant full Google Search Console access to Growth X.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Investigate the high engagement rate anomaly.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Add new topics to the "Banking Alternatives" cluster by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Notify Nacho via Slack when new topics are added.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Deliver the 2026 project scope document by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/f8syKA9rcjKWbmsv3kW2_ySwcSpEnNWv?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
